Thinkers Dilemma
Content Studio
Sign in with your authorized Google account to access the studio.
Access restricted to authorized accounts only.
⚠ Auth not configured — running in dev mode  ·  Add Client ID to enable login
TD Studio
Saved
Site & Issue

These values appear on every page — in the masthead, utility bar, footer, and dateline.

Social Links
Lead Story

The headline story on the front page and the article page. Fields marked "HTML" accept inline tags like <em> and <b>.

Issue Plate

The dark card displayed alongside the lead headline.

Homepage Excerpt

Three paragraphs of running text below the lead. HTML supported — wrap the end of the last paragraph in <span class="jump">…</span> for the continued-in link.

Pull Quote
Subscribe Block
Essays

Newest first. The first item is the lead story. Each essay drives the front page secondary grid, the essays page, the archive, and the article page.

Episodes

The first item with featured: true appears in the hero on the episodes page. Newest first.

Field Notes

Short TikTok dispatches. Newest first.

Page Intros

The masthead text (kicker, title, dek, and side stat) for the Essays, Episodes, Notes, and Archive pages.

Transmission Ticker

The scrolling strip that runs below the utility bar. Each item can be a plain line, a highlighted "hot" item, or start with a ✦ star. Reorder by dragging.

Footer
Footer Columns

Three link columns. Each row is a label + a URL.
